title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 271.170 - File certificate of proof of stray
text:
271.170.  File certificate of proof of stray. — The county clerk on receiving the certificate of the proof of any stray shall file the same, and write in the margin of the record and opposite the amount with which the taker-up stands charged the words "proved and reclaimed".
(RSMo 1939 § 14514) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12840; 1919 § 4330; 1909 § 831
